note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 1: Mateo wakes up to an unusual dream and can't shake the feeling it's more than just a dream Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The First Bounce") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 2: Mateo starts experiencing strange, unexplainable glitches on his computer and phone Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The First Bounce") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 3: Mateo arrives at the lab to find Dr. Baeza working on a new experiment Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The First Bounce") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 4: Mateo asks Dr. Baeza about her project and she's hesitant to share details Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The First Bounce") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 5: Javi teases Mateo about his lack of technical knowledge Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The First Bounce") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 6: Chief Ortega arrives, asking about the project's progress and potential risks Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The First Bounce") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 7: Mateo starts experiencing more glitches and strange occurrences at home Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The First Bounce") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 8: Mateo tries to troubleshoot the issues but can't find a logical explanation Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The First Bounce") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 9: Mateo confides in Zoë about his experiences and she offers to help him investigate Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The First Bounce") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 10: Mateo and Zoë start digging into the lab's experiments and possible connections to Mateo's glitches Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The First Bounce") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 11: Dr. Baeza warns them about the risks of meddling with her project Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The First Bounce") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 12: Mateo and Zoë meet with Marina to discuss their findings and potential consequences Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The First Bounce") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 13: Mateo starts experiencing more intense, disturbing glitches and visions Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The First Bounce") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 14: Mateo realizes he needs to take drastic action to stop the anomalies Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The First Bounce") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.
